title: NHSRC Notification 2026 - Apply Online for Consultant Posts
description: The National Health Systems Resource Centre (NHSRC) has officially released the notification for the recruitment of various Consultant Jobs. Candidates who have qualified in the MBBS, BDS, B.Sc Nursing, B.Pharm, and MBA can grab this chance and apply for the NHSRC Notification 202 6 . Here we included the age limit, selection process, salary structure, education details, applciation fee, and how to apply for these posts. Interested and eligible candidates can apply online before the last date...
